title: Bundle Craft Plus
description: Craft the bundle, and scroll through it!
body:
**Bundle Craft** Plus brings the bundle back to life by making it craftable in survival mode and adding it to the *Tools and Utilities* tab in Creative. It also enhances how bundles work: you can now scroll through a bundle’s contents with your mouse wheel to reorder the items and choose which one will be removed when you right-click!
